_capture_metadata.captured_from: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-4bit emission shape captured 2026-05-04 BEFORE the auto-detect was fixed to route Qwen3_5MoeForConditionalGeneration → qwen3_coder. With hermes parser routing in place, the parser couldn't extract this XML and dumped it into content.
_capture_metadata.purpose: Defense-in-depth: even though our detector now routes Qwen3.5+/3.6+ MoE to qwen3_coder, recovery should catch any case where this XML leaks into content (e.g., user manually overrode parser, or future model variant misroutes).
